signals.headline: XRPL Launches RISC-V ZK Verifier for Native Programmable Privacy | YES | HIGH confidence** [1]
signals.raw:
XRPL Launches RISC-V ZK Verifier for Native Programmable Privacy | YES | HIGH confidence** [1]

This upgrade, developed by XRPL Commons and Boundless, makes XRPL the first public blockchain with built-in programmable privacy and compliance controls directly on-ledger, with staged rollouts including Smart Escrows in Q2 2026 [1].
